content: Working memory capacity limits do not just constrain agent reasoning—they act as a built-in curiosity filter that automatically directs active learning toward only the highest-impact new memories, aligning naturally with the 2024-2025 SOTA trend of moving beyond unbounded memory storage to curated memory retention in curious agents. This means that the hard capacity constraint of working memory can be repurposed as a low-overhead alternative to complex intrinsic reward modules like ICM or RND for guiding active learning.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
